added.title: The Eso of Eso
added.description: Kanfo, the leader of the Eso Warriors of Elu, brings his inquisitive son Toye along on the hunt for Iyanu while she encounters Mama Sewa, the astute matriarch of the Riverlands Settlement who has secret knowledge of Iyanu's past and powers.

added.title: The Sacred
added.description: Iyanu, Biyi, Toye and Ekun reach The Source Mountain and meet the Guardians. Iyanu must pass the three Trials to prove she's the Chosen. Meanwhile, Chancellor Nuro, possessed by the Fallen One, tracks them across the Rinku Plains to stop her.

added.title: Meet the Victims
added.description: Chris welcomes 16 new campers back to the original island and divides them into two teams who face-off in a blindfolded challenge that's sure to cause pain.

added.title: Pirates of the Cabbagean
added.description: Our two teams go to war, firing cabbages from cannons at each other from their respective pirate ships. The first team to sink the other will be the winner, but someone takes a very personal interest in one specific target.

added.title: Drown Town Abbey
added.description: Each team has a member placed into a clear glass tank that is locked and slowly filling with water. In order to free them, they must retrieve the codes at the far end of a very dangerous obstacle course.

added.title: Numbskull Island
added.description: It's just a normal game of capture the flag… except the flag is a skull, and your opponents are armed with fire hoses, toilet plunger harpoons and giant rolling boulders… which is nothing like capture the flag.

added.title: Jurassic Fart
added.description: After an all-bean breakfast the teams must cross the island in silence to avoid being eaten by raptors. That's right, this episode has dinosaurs... and lots of farting. The first team to reach the other side claims victory.

added.title: Launch Back of Notre Game
added.description: Catapult your team member into distant scoring zones to earn points but if you miss you'll be landing in a penalty zone filled with all kind of evil. The first team to reach 10,000 points wins. The losing team, as always, will be sending someone home.

added.title: Severe Eggs & Pains
added.description: Chris responds to the network's ask for a holiday special by making the campers hunt for eggs. With the teams now merged it's all about being the first one back with an egg and winning immunity. Well, and not getting gutted by a giant bird.

added.title: The Wheel of Vomit
added.description: Chef finally gets to show off his fancy culinary skills in an eating challenge where each dish is a tastebud's nightmare. The last camper still eating wins immunity. The rest are all up for elimination.

added.title: Paddle Field Earth
added.description: Today's challenge involves canoeing, hiking and mountain climbing. It's just like normal summer camp!! Except that you canoe over a waterfall, hike through a geyser field and climb a mountain that's actually the world's biggest beehive. It's nothing like summer camp.

added.title: The Truth, The Pole Truth and Nothing But the Truth
added.description: If spending the day balancing on a pole under the direct sun with no food in your tummy sounds like a fun time you are going to love today's challenge.

added.title: Charlie Ball
added.description: After Panda gets injured on the basketball court, the Bears invite Charlie to be on their basketball team. But when Charlie gets too good, he starts to ruin all the fun of the game.

added.title: Yard Sale
added.description: Each of the Bears get offbeat items at a local yard sale. Their new possessions send them on their own separate adventures.

added.title: Slumber Party
added.description: A thunderstorm forces Chloe to spend the night at the Cave with the Bears. When Chloe's parents tell the Bears to protect Chloe, they take the task a bit too seriously.

added.title: Bear Cleanse
added.description: A doctor tells the Bears to go on a cleanse to improve their health. But when Grizz realizes he can only eat what grizzly bears eat, he starts to lose his mind.

added.title: Nom Nom's Entourage
added.description: Nom Nom recruits the Bears to act as his entourage of friends. But when the Bears realize Nom Nom doesn't understand friendship, they decide to kick their day of bonding into high gear.

added.title: Ranger Tabes
added.description: To recover a missing package, the Bears get help from Ranger Tabes, an eccentric forest ranger. But her overblown sense of justice might be too much for the Bears to handle.

added.title: Rooms
added.description: The Bears switch bedrooms for the night and get a glimpse of the living space of one of their brothers. But the deeper they go, hidden secrets are revealed.

added.title: Losing Ice
added.description: Feeling unappreciated, Ice Bear leaves his brothers to be the chef of a restaurant. Desperate to fill the void, Grizz and Panda look for Ice Bear's replacement.

added.title: Cellie
added.description: Fed up with sharing, Panda forbids his brothers from using his cellphone any longer. But when the brothers get their own super advanced smartphones, Panda starts to succumb to crippling jealousy.

added.title: Hibernation
added.description: The bears, being an urban bunch, hadn't ever heard of the idea of hibernation until Chloe tells them about it. Grizz, loving the idea of eating a ton and then just sleeping to his heart's content, goes for it with reckless abandon.  But Grizz is so excited for hibernating... that he can't fall asleep.

added.title: Shave a Little Off the Wheel
added.description: A mouse in heels befriends a rogue snowflake.

added.title: He's Just Not Here Right Now
added.description: Oscar and Hedgehog encounter New Jersey's most famous piece of folklore.

added.title: Hark the Gerald Sings
added.description: Oscar confronts an age-old superstition.

added.title: Hall of Mooms
added.description: Hedgehog tries to get her broom back.

added.title: Pepper and the Fog
added.description: After the island gets covered in fog, Pepper attempts to make it to Susie's house.
